subcodes.first_line: O thou who art firm in the Covenant! Thy letter was received and its contents became known. That gathering with its president truly [3.5s]... ...As for those who are engaged in government service, they should perform their duties with the utmost fidelity, trustworthiness, rectitude, uprightness, integrity and high-mindedness
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان نامه شما رسید مضمون معلوم گردید آن انجمن با رایس فی الحقیقه
subcodes.subjects: @obedience to and respect for government authority, @justice and wrath of God, @non-participation in politics
